name: Natural Shampoo + Rinse System
description: A pH-matched hair care system using soapwort saponins for gentle cleansing at the scalp's natural pH (~5), with ACV rinse and clinically-supported rosemary for hair growth.
effectivenessNote: Cleans effectively, much gentler long-term. No lather/fragrance/silicone feel. After 2–4 week adjustment, most report healthier hair. Rosemary has clinical hair growth evidence.
warnings: Minimal lather — cleaning is chemical, not foam
Soapwort spoils in 7–10 days — make frequent small batches
2–4 week transition period — hair feels oily/waxy while scalp adjusts
Castile soap + hard water = soap scum (soapwort doesn't have this problem)
scienceNote: Soapwort saponins = same amphiphilic structure as SLS but don't penetrate lipid barrier. pH ~5 = no disruption. Rosemary adds three clinical mechanisms. Commercial shampoo strips with sulfates, then coats with silicones — a self-perpetuating purchase cycle.
